'''âk-f-g''' ('''kafaga''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:public|public]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-f-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:public|public]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-f-g
|-
! Lemma
| kafaga
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kafagithi|kafagithi]] || [[word:kafagiji|kafagiji]] || [[word:kafagishi|kafagishi]] || [[word:kafagi|kafagi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kafaguthuth|kafaguthuth]] || [[word:kafagujuj|kafagujuj]] || [[word:kafagushush|kafagushush]] || [[word:kafag|kafag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kafaguthu|kafaguthu]] || [[word:kafaguju|kafaguju]] || [[word:kafagushu|kafagushu]] || [[word:kafagu|kafagu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kafagufuth|kafagufuth]] || [[word:kafagufuj|kafagufuj]] || [[word:kafagufush|kafagufush]] || [[word:kafaguf|kafaguf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kafagethe|kafagethe]] || [[word:kafageje|kafageje]] || [[word:kafageshe|kafageshe]] || [[word:kafage|kafage]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kafagothoth|kafagothoth]] || [[word:kafagojoj|kafagojoj]] || [[word:kafagoshosh|kafagoshosh]] || [[word:kafag|kafag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kafagotho|kafagotho]] || [[word:kafagojo|kafagojo]] || [[word:kafagosho|kafagosho]] || [[word:kafago|kafago]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kafagofoth|kafagofoth]] || [[word:kafagofoj|kafagofoj]] || [[word:kafagofosh|kafagofosh]] || [[word:kafagof|kafagof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kafagĂŠthĂŠ|kafagĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:kafagĂŠjĂŠ|kafagĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:kafagĂŠshĂŠ|kafagĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:kafagĂŠ|kafagĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kafagathath|kafagathath]] || [[word:kafagajaj|kafagajaj]] || [[word:kafagashash|kafagashash]] || [[word:kafag|kafag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kafagatha|kafagatha]] || [[word:kafagaja|kafagaja]] || [[word:kafagasha|kafagasha]] || [[word:kafaga|kafaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kafagafath|kafagafath]] || [[word:kafagafaj|kafagafaj]] || [[word:kafagafash|kafagafash]] || [[word:kafagaf|kafagaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:kafagasha|kafagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gokafagasha|gokafagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokikafagasha|gokikafagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:kafagnĂŒsha|kafagnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokafagnknĂŒsha|gokafagnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokikafagnĂŒsha|gokikafagnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kafagshĂ«sha|kafagshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokafagnkshĂ«sha|gokafagnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikafagshĂ«sha|gokikafagshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kafagrosha|kafagrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokafagnkrosha|gokafagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikafagrosha|gokikafagrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kafagmusha|kafagmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokafagnkmusha|gokafagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikafagmusha|gokikafagmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:kafagsherasha|kafagsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokafagnksherasha|gokafagnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokikafagsherasha|gokikafagsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:kafagngasha|kafagngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokafagnkngasha|gokafagnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokikafagngasha|gokikafagngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kafagyasha|kafagyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokafagnkyasha|gokafagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokikafagyasha|gokikafagyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:kafagyamasha|kafagyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokafagnkyamasha|gokafagnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokikafagyamasha|gokikafagyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:kafagnĂŒshĂ«sha|kafagnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokafagnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gokafagnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikafagnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokikafagnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kafagnĂŒrosha|kafagnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokafagnknĂŒrosha|gokafagnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikafagnĂŒrosha|gokikafagnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafagnĂŒmusha|kafagnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokafagnknĂŒmusha|gokafagnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikafagnĂŒmusha|gokikafagnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:kafagshĂ«nĂŒsha|kafagshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokafagnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokafagnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikafagshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokikafagshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kafagshĂ«rosha|kafagshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokafagnkshĂ«rosha|gokafagnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikafagshĂ«rosha|gokikafagshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafagshĂ«musha|kafagshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokafagnkshĂ«musha|gokafagnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikafagshĂ«musha|gokikafagshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:kafagronĂŒsha|kafagronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokafagnkronĂŒsha|gokafagnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikafagronĂŒsha|gokikafagronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:kafagroshĂ«sha|kafagroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokafagnkroshĂ«sha|gokafagnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikafagroshĂ«sha|gokikafagroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafagromusha|kafagromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokafagnkromusha|gokafagnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikafagromusha|gokikafagromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:kafagmunĂŒsha|kafagmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokafagnkmunĂŒsha|gokafagnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikafagmunĂŒsha|gokikafagmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:kafagmushĂ«sha|kafagmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokafagnkmushĂ«sha|gokafagnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikafagmushĂ«sha|gokikafagmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kafagmurosha|kafagmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokafagnkmurosha|gokafagnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikafagmurosha|gokikafagmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:kafag|kafag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kĂŠfĂŠg|kĂŠfĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hokafag|hokafag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hokĂŠfĂŠg|hokĂŠfĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohokafag|hohokafag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohokĂŠfĂŠg|hohokĂŠfĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒkafag|nĂŒkafag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒkĂŠfĂŠg|nĂŒkĂŠfĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒkafag|nĂŒnĂŒkafag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒkĂŠfĂŠg|nĂŒnĂŒkĂŠfĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻkafag|nĂŻkafag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻkĂŠfĂŠg|nĂŻkĂŠfĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻkafag|nĂŻnĂŻkafag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻkĂŠfĂŠg|nĂŻnĂŻkĂŠfĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lukafag|lukafag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lukĂŠfĂŠg|lukĂŠfĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulukafag|lulukafag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulukĂŠfĂŠg|lulukĂŠfĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:likafag|likafag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:likĂŠfĂŠg|likĂŠfĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilikafag|lilikafag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilikĂŠfĂŠg|lilikĂŠfĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kokafag|kokafag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kokĂŠfĂŠg|kokĂŠfĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokokafag|kokokafag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokokĂŠfĂŠg|kokokĂŠfĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kekafag|kekafag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kekĂŠfĂŠg|kekĂŠfĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekekafag|kekekafag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekekĂŠfĂŠg|kekekĂŠfĂŠg]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|2edd495}}
